name: testTransactionTableMatchesDownloadedCsv
description: The transaction table data on the UI matches the exported CSV file data.
descriptionHtml: The transaction table data on the UI matches the exported CSV file data.

steps.name: Navigate to '/' endpoint
Login to the site as '0730.172521.24.super@email.com'
Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field
Press 'Login' button

testStage.description: The transaction table data on the UI matches the exported CSV file data.

steps.name: Click on 'Transactions' menu in Header
Set start and end date: 30-07-2025 to 30-07-2025
Select 'CompanyForTestRunOnly Inc.' company using filter
Select 'MerchantCompanyForTestRunOnly Inc.' business unit using filter
Click 'Export table data to file' button
Select 'CSV' option
Read and parse CSV from path: downloads/transactions-export.csv
Verify: CSV headers match the UI headers
Verify the row count between UI and CSV
Verify: cell values match between UI and CSV
Verify: cell values match between UI and CSV
